items.title: Octopus Electroverse and Visa introduce fleet payment car
items.description: The Business Payments Card serves as both a fleet and spending card, covering expenses such as EV charging, tolls, and meals.

items.title: Latest News In Digital Payment - Technology Shaping Future of Global Transactions
items.description: The digital payments sector is experiencing significant advancements, shaped by a host of technological trends. Non-cash transactions are projected to grow at a robust CAGR of 15% through 2028, driven by convenience and security features in digital wallets and instant payment solutions. AI integration is enhancing the payment ecosystem by optimizing checkout experiences and bolstering fraud prevention.
